repository.name: slack-ai-agents
repository.description: Slack 기반 AI 라이프 에이전트 — 자연어로 일정/루틴/수면 관리 + 크론 알림

commit.message:
feat: 实现6大核心优化功能

1. ✅ 数据去重逻辑
   - 基于评论ID的缓存系统
   - 内容去重,避免重复评论
   - 自动清理30天前的缓存
   - 显著节省API调用成本

2. ⚡ 并发分析优化
   - 使用Promise.all()并发处理
   - 5个评论同时分析,速度提升5倍
   - 批次间自动限流,避免超限
   - 优雅的错误处理和降级

3. 🚨 智能告警系统
   - 4级告警(P0/P1/P2/P3)
   - 自动检测负面评论激增
   - 危险关键词监控(crash/bug/refund等)
   - Telegram实时告警推送

4. 🛡️ 增强错误处理
   - 3次自动重试,指数退避
   - 断路器模式,防止级联失败
   - 限流器,保护API
   - 失败时自动降级处理

5. 📊 竞品对比功能
   - 支持Temu/AliExpress/Wish对比
   - 自动获取竞品评分数据
   - 生成对比报告和图表
   - Telegram推送对比结果

6. 📈 可视化图表
   - QuickChart API生成图表
   - 情感分布饼图
   - 评分分布柱状图
   - 主题分布横向图
   - 竞品对比图

新增文件:
- src/utils/cache.ts - 缓存和去重
- src/utils/concurrent.ts - 并发处理
- src/utils/alerts.ts - 智能告警
- src/utils/competitors.ts - 竞品对比
- src/utils/charts.ts - 可视化图表
- docs/NEW_FEATURES.md - 功能文档

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

sec: SEC-007 Validar versão GGUF em Load/Save

Adicionadas constantes GGUFMinVersion (3) e GGUFMaxVersion (3).
Implementadas funções de validação:
- ValidateGGUFVersion(version): verifica se versão está no intervalo suportado
- GGUFReader com ReadHeader(): lê e valida magic number e versão
- Erros específicos: ErrInvalidMagic, ErrVersionTooOld, ErrVersionTooNew

Preparação para futura implementação de loading GGUF com validação
rigorosa de formato e versão.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(ui): add Linux native GTK4 backend with reactive flow fixes and ui.html widget

Introduce GTK4-based native UI rendering alongside the existing terminal and
browser backends. The reactive flow engine now caps update cycles at 255 to
prevent infinite loops. The RSS reader example is refactored to use individual
single-output event handlers instead of a multi-output Update func, fixing
state corruption from multi-emit returns. New ui.html() widget renders HTML
content via Pango markup in GTK and passes through raw HTML in the browser.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: 移除 CockroachDB 支持，统一使用本地 SQLite 数据库

删除 cockroach_migration.py、db_retry.py，简化 config.py 和启动流程，
移除 psycopg2-binary/sqlalchemy-cockroachdb 依赖，清理所有文档引用。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: strip ANSI color codes from captured command output (#98)

Commands that produce colored output (e.g. aqua install logs) embed
ANSI escape sequences into the document. Use go-colorable's
NewNonColorable to strip colors from captured buffers while still
displaying them on the terminal.

Reverting standalone removal (broke RAILPACK build). Instead, keep
standalone for RAILPACK auto-detection but override startCommand in

files. Removed builder/buildCommand since RAILPACK handles builds.

is already apps/web).

docs: update CLAUDE.md with Spirit Island patterns and HUD position registry

- Add HUD fixed-position stacking registry to prevent future collisions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: strip trailing slashes in metric paths (#530)

* fix: strip trailing slashes in metric paths and fix whitelist

Trailing slashes from client requests (e.g. /1/ vs /1) caused duplicate
path labels in Prometheus. Strip them in normalizedPath and update
whitelist regexes to match paths with optional trailing slashes.

Also collapse delegation paths to reduce cardinality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: avoid empty string edge case when stripping trailing slashes

Only strip trailing slashes when path is longer than '/', since
req.path is guaranteed to be at least '/'.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove delegation path normalization

Delegation normalization was intentionally removed in #529.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: simplify trailing slash handling and clean up dead regex

Use endsWith + slice instead of regex for slash stripping. Remove dead
(\/|$) alternation in subgraph match since trailing slashes are already
stripped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: --preload 제거 (SQLite fork 충돌 방지)

--preload가 master 프로세스에서 init_db()를 실행해
SQLite 연결을 연 상태로 gthread 워커가 fork되면서
포트 오픈 실패 → 반복 크래시 발생.
--preload 제거로 각 워커가 독립적으로 초기화하도록 수정.

commit.message:
feat: add Spirit Island HUD components, DRY init helpers, and review fixes

- Add 3 HUD components: DisruptionTracker, ThreatCadenceIndicator, ElementSynergyBar
- Mount HUD components in App.tsx (desktop + compact mobile views)
- Add Spirit Island toggle in GameSetup using chip pattern
- Extract createDefaultSpiritIslandState() + ALL_SUBSYSTEMS to spirit-island.ts
- Replace 5x duplicated init blocks in game-store.ts and simulator-v2.ts
- Fix HUD position collisions (DisruptionTracker 310->520px, ThreatCadence 430->640px)
- Fix Force element icon from 'W' to 'Fc' in ElementSynergyBar
- Add 276-line integration test (init variants + AI-vs-AI with Spirit Island)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): switch to Granular Access Token auth (drop Trusted Publishers)

npm Trusted Publishers does not auto-detect OIDC for authentication —
npm 11.11.0 + OIDC available + no .npmrc = still ENEEDAUTH. The OIDC
id-token is used only for Sigstore provenance signing, not registry auth.

Both workflows now use NPM_TOKEN secret (Granular Access Token, bypass 2FA).
Provenance attestation still works via id-token: write.

scripts to read from /dev/stdin and parse the nested
tool_input structure correctly.

Fix photo recognition: handle images sent as files, store analysis in memory

- Extract analyze_image() as shared function for both photo and document paths

commit.message:
feat: add container support for running commands in Docker (#97)

* feat: add container support for running commands in Docker containers

Add support for `<!-- docfresh container -->` directive that creates
Docker containers, and allow `<!-- docfresh begin -->` blocks to
execute commands inside them via `command.container.id`.

This improves security and reproducibility by isolating command
execution in containers with configurable images, volumes, env vars,
file copying, and setup commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add Docker labels to containers for identification

Add docfresh.file_path, docfresh.absolute_file_path, and docfresh.id
labels to containers so they can be identified as docfresh-generated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add the document about containers

* fix: detect non-zero exit code in container command execution

DockerCLIEngine.Exec captures non-zero exit codes in TemplateInput
without returning an error, so execContainerCommand silently ignored
command failures. Now check result.ExitCode after a successful Exec
call and fail appropriately unless IgnoreFail is set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add colored WARNING prefix to container cleanup messages

Use github.com/fatih/color to display yellow WARNING prefix in
container cleanup messages for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: use slog for container cleanup messages instead of fmt with color

Replace fmt.Fprintf with color by slog.Warn, embedding the actual
container ID in the message for easy copy-paste of docker commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: use container name instead of container ID in cleanup log messages

Add Name method to ContainerEngine interface and implement it on
DockerCLIEngine using docker inspect. Update cleanupContainers to
resolve the human-readable container name for log messages, falling
back to the container ID if name retrieval fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: correct CopyFiles key/value order to match documented semantics

The map key is the container destination path and the value is the host
source path. Fix the loop variable names and jsonschema description to
reflect this.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add container file reading support and fix container-file rendering

Add the ability to read files from containers using the `file.container`
configuration. Implement `ReadFile` in the container engine interface,
`execContainerFile` in the execution layer, and handle the
"container-file" type in render/summary switch statements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [autofix.ci] apply automated fixes

Switch to redirect auth flow with same-origin authDomain

and works reliably with same-origin auth handler.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Delivery Brain multimodal data ingestion module

New module for ingesting multimodal data with the following features:

File Support:
- Text files: TXT, MD, XML, JSON, CSV
- Documents: PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX
- Audio: MP3, WAV, M4A, FLAC, OGG
- Video: MP4, AVI, WMV, MOV, MKV

Features:
- Automatic file type detection
- Text cleaning and normalization (ftfy, encoding fixes)
- Audio/video transcription via OpenAI Whisper (MIT)
- Speaker diarization via pyannote.audio (MIT)
- Intelligent text chunking for embeddings
- Dual storage: TinyDB/MongoDB (NoSQL) + ChromaDB (Vector)

API Endpoints:
- POST /api/delivery-brain/ingest - Ingest directory
- POST /api/delivery-brain/ingest-file - Ingest single file
- GET /api/delivery-brain/search - Search documents
- GET /api/delivery-brain/statistics - Storage stats
- GET /api/delivery-brain/history - Ingestion history
- GET /api/delivery-brain/supported-formats - List formats
- DELETE /api/delivery-brain/document/{id} - Delete document

All dependencies use permissive licenses (MIT, BSD, Apache-2.0).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: Prevent analysis progress logs from appearing in GitHub Issues

Changed all analysis progress console.log() to console.error() to output
to stderr instead of stdout. This prevents the analyzing messages from
being captured in the markdown reports and GitHub Issues.

Changes:
- app-store analyzer: 3 console.log → console.error
- google-play analyzer: 3 console.log → console.error
- qwen analyzer (twitter): 1 console.log → console.error

Impact:
- GitHub Issues will now only contain the final report
- Analysis progress still visible in GitHub Actions logs (stderr)
- Cleaner, more professional issue content

feat: declutter UI — remove unused modes, upgrade double-tap to orbital burst

- Remove walls and autoplay toggles from mode strip (0 and 4 uses
  respectively across 165 sessions) — still accessible via keyboard
- Add orbit mode toggle to mode strip (10 uses, deserves visibility)

  temporary gravity well instead of a plain burst
- Remove dead code: maelstrom, orbit-lock, tidal pulse effects

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: extract PID metrics from tfResult for Flash Tune quality score (#184)

Flash Tune (quick mode) previously skipped PID metrics extraction
entirely, causing quality scores to have fewer components and dip
lower than Deep Tune sessions. Now pidMetrics are extracted from
tfResult (Wiener deconvolution) for quick mode, same as pidResult
for guided mode.

Also adds pidMetrics propagation in quick_applied phase handler
in App.tsx — previously only filterMetrics and transferFunctionMetrics
were passed to the tuning session.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: proposals not saving — use get_supabase_admin() to bypass RLS

Root cause: content_agent used get_supabase() (anon key) for insert
into proposals table which has RLS enabled. Anon key silently fails.
Now uses get_supabase_admin() (service_role key) like proposals router.

Also: html_url stored both top-level and in client_data JSON,
added verification logging after insert to catch future failures.

commit.message:
Replace dual-mode system with always-passthrough terminal + compose panel

Remove ModeDetector (218 lines) and all mode-switching complexity. Terminal
always owns keyboard input. Compose panel (Cmd+E) provides multi-line editing
when needed, hidden by default.

Also fixes 33 issues from debug scan:
- CRITICAL: CWD validation, scrollback cap (100KB), session save resilience
- HIGH: double-submit race (sequential queue), countByWindow fix, memory leaks
  across 7 UI components (disposables pattern)
- MEDIUM: ownership-before-rate-limit, store corruption recovery, shell
  integration path check, SESSION_SET type guard
- LOW: removed dead code (PtyResizeOptions, APP_NEW_WINDOW, APP_FLOAT_ON_TOP)

Shell integration: OSC 133 markers injected via PTY write after 500ms delay.
Notification sounds: bullet redesigned for laptop speakers, trigger via OSC 133
command-finished detection.

서버 재시작(502/503)으로 토큰 갱신에 실패하면 원래 401이 재throw되는데,
_layout.tsx가 이를 '진짜 만료'로 오해하고 로그아웃 처리하던 문제 수정.

인터셉터는 진짜 만료 확인 시에만 accessToken을 삭제하므로,
401 에러 후 스토리지에 토큰이 남아있으면 서버 일시 불가로 판단해 인증 상태 유지.

v6.2: Cloud fallback, context menu, WhatsApp live observer

Cloud fallback (works without Ollama):
- Fallback chain: cache → Ollama → chetana.activemirror.ai/api/scan → local gate
- Every user gets a verdict even without local AI running
- Cloud availability auto-resets every 5 min

Context menu:
- Right-click any selected text → "Check with Chetana"
- Right-click any link → "Check with Chetana"
- Right-click page → "Check this page"
- Scans text through full chain, opens side panel with result

WhatsApp Web live observer:
- MutationObserver watches #main for new message bubbles (1.5s debounce)
- Instant local gate check on content script side (no round-trip)
- Shows inline warning banner for scam signals: UPI urgency, digital arrest,
  OTP theft, investment scam, lottery, suspicious links
- Banner auto-dismisses after 15s, manual dismiss available
- Full scan forwarded to background via scanText message

commit.message:
fix(engine): release Stuck friction limiter and early silence onset (v2.18)

p_stuck was structurally capped at ~5% due to low friction clamp
bounds (0.45/0.35) and late silence path onset (5s). Release clamp
to 1.0 with faster ramp divisors, lower silence threshold to 2s,
and smooth Incubation x=1 emission cliff (y=1: 0.10→0.08).
Stuck now reachable at ~30s sustained silence, enabling Nudge/Wall.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(client): replace @pbe/react-yandex-maps with direct Yandex Maps JS API

The library had multiple hidden bugs that prevented the map from rendering:
- C() helper drops width/height when className prop is present → 0px height
- onError prop silently dropped by the HOC wrapper
- onLoad fires on API ready, not tile load

New implementation:
- Loads api-maps.yandex.ru/2.1 script via useEffect with id-based dedup
- Initialises ymaps.Map directly on a ref-attached container div
- Adds Clusterer + Placemarks + controls via native ymaps API
- fitToViewport() on fullscreen toggle; destroy() on unmount
